span.p:
Step 1
─────
Create SSH Key
aws ec2 create-key-pair

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step 2
─────
Launch EC2
aws ec2 run-instances

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step 3
─────
Get Public IP
aws ec2 describe-instances

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step 8
─────
nginx Setup
sudo dnf install nginx
